questions.prompt: An MSP technician leaves. Which Printix access paths should you check? (Select all that apply.)
choices: Direct System manager seats inside customer tenants
questions.explanation: Partner Portal access and tenant roles are separate. A technician may have both partner access and direct System manager or Site manager access in a customer tenant.

questions.prompt: Deleting a Printix tenant from the Partner Portal is a reversible cleanup step after subscription cancellation.
questions.explanation: Tenant deletion is permanent and requires the System manager role plus Partner Portal access per the Delete tenant procedure. Treat it as a final data-removal step, not routine cleanup.
